items.title: Toronto Raptors Face RJ Barrett Decision Before Next Summer
items.author: Yahoo Sports

items.title: Scottie Barnes & RJ Barrett combined to score 48.3 points per game this postseason, the most by a Raptors' duo since Kawhi Leonard & Pascal Siakam in 2019.
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt: Scottie Barnes & RJ Barrett combined to score 48.3 points per game this postseason, the most by a Raptors' duo since Kawhi Leonard & Pascal Siakam in 2019.

items.title: [Fischer] The Raptors and Clippers have held real trade conversations this weekend on sending Kawhi Leonard back to Toronto, according to league sources. Sources say Toronto has expressed a preference in dealing Brandon Ingram to Los Angeles, as opposed to RJ Barrett.
items.author: Odd-Direction9452
items.body_excerpt: The Raptors and Clippers have held real trade conversations this weekend on sending Kawhi Leonard back to Toronto, according to the league sources. In discussions with the Clippers, sources say Toronto has expressed a preference in dealing Brandon Ingram to Los Angeles, as…
